case_title: NAZANIN UDDIN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UDDIN, NAZANIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,635.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
